title: Sabrelake Weapon Assets
body:
Sabrelake’s firearms always have an absurd rate of fire. Weapon labs need to progress further with testing to really see what this math is capable of.

Adjusted and heavily modified guns can start pushing physics into wild unknown territory..exciting stuff.

The warehouse should support these kinds of things but we really need to evaluate the implications for testing.. Do these present too different variables for accurate data collection?

KW
